posts.title: Texas Pedes we have until May 18 to let our voices be heard. If not, our utility costs will go through the roof.

twitter.content:
🚨🛑🚨Texans, this affects every single one of us. 🚨🛑🚨

There are millions of Texans who pay electric bills, yet only about 600 people have submitted opposition so far to the PUCT rules §25.58 and §25.101. 14 days remaining to submit opposition, do not wait until the last
